notes: Live rotation rehearsal re-run for the v0.7.0 minor-version boundary gate. The authentication middleware and JWT/token handling paths are unchanged from v0.6.0 through the enterprise model slices (v0.6.3–v0.6.8) and contact-center expansion (v0.6.1, v0.6.2). Enterprise model additions (numbering plans, sites, trunk-groups, line appearances, schedule groups) use the same JWT auth middleware without modification. Rotation procedure follows docs/ops/runtime-token-rotation.md.

auth_path_review.note: All enterprise model endpoints use the existing tenant-scoped JWT middleware (tenantGuard). No new auth paths, middleware branches, or token types were introduced in v0.6.3–v0.6.8.

audit.note: Tenant audit log confirmed rotation events recorded. Enterprise model operations (site create, trunk-group update, line appearance assignment) are separately audited in the tenant_audit_log table via the existing audit service.

log_redaction.note: Log redaction policy unchanged. Enterprise model endpoints log entity IDs only; no sensitive fields (SIP credentials, API keys, JWT secrets) are logged in the new endpoint paths.
